name: EQV Ventures Acquisition Corp. II
business: We are a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. We intend to focus our search for a target business in the broadly defined energy industry, primarily targeting the upstream exploration and production sector. As of December 31, 2025, we have neither engaged in any operations nor generated any revenue to date.

exposures.sentence: While we may pursue an initial business combination target in any business or industry and in any geographic region, we intend to focus our search for a target business in the broadly defined energy industry, primarily targeting the upstream exploration and production sector.

catalysts.event: Consummate initial business combination within 24 months from closing of Initial Public Offering
catalysts.sentence: We have 24 months, or such earlier date as our board of directors may approve, from the closing of the Initial Public Offering to consummate our initial business combination.
